german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Mostly Non-Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German, highlighting accessibility but with a notable share of unclassified positions.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Lead with Slight Edge Over Customer-facing PMs
pm_type.subtitle: A narrow 2-point gap highlights a balanced yet competitive landscape in product management roles.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate Workforce Composition
seniority.subtitle: 68% of positions are filled by senior-level professionals, indicating a senior-heavy market.

work_mode.title: Flexibility in Work Modes Remains Uncertain
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles lacks clear classification, blending remote, hybrid, and onsite expectations.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, with remote options remaining limited.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: 40% of roles prioritize AI responsibilities, with 35% requiring AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Exhibit Strong Balance and Diversity
industry.subtitle: No single role dominates, but unclassified positions limit overall accessibility.
